title: Federal Budget Deficit in Fiscal Years 2024-2025
description: The federal budget deficit decreased by $41 billion from fiscal year 2024 to 2025, according to the Congressional Budget Office. The deficit totaled $1.8 trillion in fiscal year 2025 and $1.8 trillion in fiscal year 2024. These numbers are based on data from the end of each fiscal year, which is September 30.
